SEARCH
Package org.vorpal.blade.framework.tpcc

Class Simple

java.lang.Object
org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
org.vorpal.blade.framework.tpcc.Simple
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Simple extends Callflow
This is a simple Third-Party Call-Control callflow. 

 
   Alice               BLADE                Bob
 ----------           --------             -----
     |                   |                   |
     |            INVITE |                   |
     |<-----(blackhole)--|                   |
     | 180 Ringing       |                   |
     |------------------>|                   |
     | 200 OK            |                   |
     |--(sdp)----------->|                   |
     |               ACK |                   |
     |<------------------|                   |
     |==(silence)========|                   |
     |          reINVITE |                   |
     |<------------------|                   |
     | 200 OK            |                   |
     |--(sdp)----------->|                   |
     |                   | INVITE            |
     |                   |--(sdp)----------->|
     |                   |       180 Ringing |
     |                   |<------------------|
     |                   |            200 OK |
     |                   |                   |
     |                   |                   |
     |                   | INVITE            |
     |                   |--(sdp)----------->|
     |                   |                   |
     |                   |                   |
     |                   |                   |
     |                   |                   |
     |                   |                   |
     |                   |                   |
     |                   |                   |
     |                   |                   |
     | INVITE            |                   |
     |--(sdp)----------->|                   |
     |                   | INVITE            |
     |                   |--(sdp)----------->|
     |                   |            200 OK |
     |                   |<-----------(sdp)--|
     |            200 OK |                   |
     |<-----------(sdp)--|                   |
     | ACK               |                   |
     |------------------>|                   |
     |                   | ACK               |
     |                   |------------------>|
     |                   |                   |
